spec.name: Cushioncone
spec.summary: Creates a temporary, soft cushion of energy that absorbs impact when landing on a surface.
spec.effect_description: Creates a temporary, soft cushion of energy that absorbs impact when landing on a surface. A square dampen/create recipe that channels binding discipline into kinetic output. It applies a cone pattern against surface across self reach with immediate persistence.
